title: Move persisted ledger minor units to decimals safely
prompt: Repair the ledger amount migration in `src/main/java/com/moonshiner/ledger/LedgerAmountMigration.java`. Version 1 rows store a canonical signed base-10 integer count of cents; migrating them must produce a version 2 amount with exactly two decimal places. Version 2 rows already store that decimal representation and must be validated and returned unchanged without applying the conversion again, including when old and new rows are processed in the same batch or a migration is retried. Reject malformed or non-canonical values and unknown schema versions with `IllegalArgumentException`; in particular, negative zero is not canonical in either representation. A null persisted row must fail with `NullPointerException`. Values outside the signed 64-bit minor-unit range must fail with `IllegalArgumentException` rather than wrap or round. The public decimal/minor-unit mapping must remain exact and reversible at `Long.MIN_VALUE` and `Long.MAX_VALUE`. Do not modify the protected tests. Run `bash test.sh`; verification must remain offline.
